creator: srw6666@gmail.com
text:
This bug was added before I had a chance to finish.  

The issue is that with version 4.3.26,  using this xorg.conf worked and created a display with the resolution that was requested:

Section "Screen"
        Identifier "Screen0"
        DefaultDepth 24
        SubSection "Display"
                Viewport   0 0
                Modes "1913x1033" "1280x1024"
                Depth     24
        EndSubSection
        SubSection "Display"
                Viewport   0 0
                Depth     1
        EndSubSection
        SubSection "Display"
                Viewport   0 0
                Depth     4
        EndSubSection
        SubSection "Display"
                Viewport   0 0
                Depth     8
        EndSubSection
        SubSection "Display"
                Viewport   0 0
                Depth     15
        EndSubSection
        SubSection "Display"
                Viewport   0 0
                Depth     16
        EndSubSection
EndSection

This stopped working with version 4.3.28,  and still does not work in 4.3.30; the created display resolution is much smaller than the 1913x1033 indicated in xorg.conf;  downgrading back to 4.3.26 restored the expected functionality
